subject: Request to delete all our data
body: As per GDPR Article 17, I am formally requesting the deletion of all personal data associated with our account. Please confirm receipt and provide a timeline for completion.

subject: Third return request - order #38771
body: This is the third time I'm requesting a return. The product still isn't working as described. I want a full refund this time or I will be disputing the charge with my bank.

subject: We are considering cancelling our Enterprise contract
body: I need to have an urgent conversation about our contract renewal. We've had three unresolved incidents in the past 60 days and our board is questioning the ROI. Please have a senior account manager call me today.
